gui.globaladvancements.hostPrivileges: If you create, load or save a world with Cheats enabled, that world will have advancements disabled, even if it is then loaded with Cheats disabled. Are you sure you want to continue?
gui.globaladvancements.creativeMode: If you create, load or save a world in Creative Mode, that world will have advancements disabled, even if it is then loaded in Survival Mode. Are you sure you want to continue?
advancements.globaladvancements.story.ho: Construct a furnace out of eight cobblestone blocks.
advancements.globaladvancements.story.ti: Use planks and sticks to make a pickaxe.
